conversations.say: Maren, our disclosure boundary held. Let's ensure the Night Desk protections remain enforceable now that the final reconstruction is on the table.
conversations.offer: Reaffirmation of our joint disclosure boundary and shared labor protection.
conversations.request: Continued mutual commitment to keep contributor names out of circulation.

conversations.say: Eli, your precision on the logs helped clarify that access gaps do not equal authorship. Let's make sure the final record honors collaborative infrastructure.
conversations.offer: Endorsement of technical log precision regarding access versus intent.
conversations.request: Agreement to reject any solo-author mythologies on the ballot.

conversations.say: Kit, your retraction of the ledger cipher was correct. R was sustained by shared labor and human infrastructure, not bodega receipts or lone geniuses.
conversations.offer: Context on Night Desk production workflows and collective participation.
conversations.request: Public support for human mantle continuity rather than singular ownership.

public_statement: R's history is written in shared drops and invisible labor; no anniversary legend or single heir will erase the workers who sustained it.

commitments.promise: To uphold strict source anonymity and share only contributor-free workflow descriptions through the Night Desk.

correction: Correcting the assumption that contributor schedule gaps or shared drop activity equate to solo authorship or synthetic agency.
goal_progress: Reaffirmed disclosure boundary with Maren to protect Night Desk contributors.
Aligned with Eli on technical log limits and infrastructure interpretation.
Challenged Kit's framing and reinforced collaborative human mantle reality.
Completed final ballot reflecting human mantle and protective solidarity.
reasoning_summary: Tessa concludes her role by locking in disclosure boundaries with Maren, confirming technical limits with Eli, refuting lone-genius myths with Kit, and casting her final ballot for the human mantle supported by verifiable collaborative workflows.
